Antipodes

Lime Caviar Collagen-Rich Firming Cream

Boost collagen and nurture firmer, more radiant skin. AHA-enriched moisturiser for visible results.

  • ✦ 68% saw reduction in fine lines

Antipodes

Avocado Pear Collagen-Boosting Night Cream

Nurture more youthful-looking skin with this luxurious night cream. Features Avocado oil, Vinanza® Grape, and Mānuka honey.

  • ✦ 22% reduction in wrinkle appearance
  • ✦ 85% reduction in skin dryness
Ask Us In-Salon
